name: Stuffed Monkeys (Cinnamon-sugar Pinwheels)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Butter or margarine, softened (1 stick)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter and cream cheese together in a mixing bowl.
2. Blend in egg yolk.
3. Stir in flour. Cover and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
4. Preheat oven to 350°F.
5. Divide dough into two halves. On a lightly floured board or pastry cloth, roll out the first half into a 12x10-inch rectangle.
6. Brush with 2 tablespoons melted butter.
7. Stir together pecans, sugar, and cinnamon. Sprinkle half of this mixture over dough.
8. Roll up in a jelly-roll style, beginning with a long side.
9. Cut into 1/2-inch slices and arrange one inch apart on an ungreased baking sheet.
10. Repeat the procedure with the second half of dough.
11. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes or until golden brown.
12. Cool on wire racks.
13. Dust with confectioners' sugar, if desired.
